state.next-action: `12-02` now uses `/portal/ops/*` as the canonical staff route family while legacy `/ops/*` paths remain compatibility redirects. Live staff-admin controls on `/portal/ops/users` now cover role-template assignment, Clerk invite send or reissue, pending-invite revoke, and explicit provider resync through app-owned ops routes while preserving first-party staff roles during Clerk reconciliation. Continue the phase by extending the same contract to the remaining admin gaps: entitlement lock or unlock plus suspension controls, then `/portal/ops/customers` actions for account linkage and customer-facing access cleanup. If feature flags expand beyond env toggles, keep them behind an app-owned adapter so Vercel Flags can be swapped later without scattering provider calls through the UI.
